text: If you’re running production in AWS ME-CENTRAL-1 or ME-SOUTH-1, this week should’ve triggered a hard review of your DR plan. Reports say mec1-az2 and mec1-az3 in the UAE were impaired, and Bahrain’s ME-SOUTH-1 took another hit on April 1. Single-region Gulf deployments need a second look. #AWS #SysAdmin
html: Multi-AZ inside one region won’t save you if the region itself is taking physical damage. UAE banking and payments already showed the blast radius, with reported outages hitting ADCB, Emirates NBD, Alaan, Hubpay, and Careem during the AWS disruption.

🔹 Al Ahli Cash Back Card Premium Category (@snbalahli)  
🔹 Al Rajhi Cash Back Plus Card (@alrajhibank)  
🔹 Mazid Emirates NBD Card (@EmiratesNBD_KSA)  
🔹 Lifestyle Card from Banque Saudi Fransi (@BSF_sa)  

Of course, they give you cash back on it (5% and above, reaching 10% or 11%, not half a percent or 1%)  

Personally, I have used all of them before 💳 but currently, I only have 2: Al Ahli Cash Back 👍 and Al Rajhi Cash Back Plus 👏  

I talked about all of them in this video 🎥📝 and which is the best in each category?  
I mean which is the best for restaurants 🍔🍽️, fuel ⛽️🚗, supermarkets 🛒, travel ✈️, airports 🛫💼, and so on...!  
The video is very important for anyone looking for the best cash back card right now:  
https://t.co/q6l3FBdipM  

As for the Nayifat card, I am currently trying it out and I will let you know for sure after I see its actual performance and try everything they offer 👍

text:
This message is directed to all the CEOs in UAE 

Dubai has always been my dream destination
 
not because of the glamorous images I’ve seen or the stories I’ve heard, but because of what I personally experienced there.

During my time in the UAE, I worked as an electrician and structural engineer, building high end exhibition stands for some of the country’s finest five star hotels. 

Through dedication and consistent delivery, I forged valuable professional connections that opened doors to a significantly better life for myself and my family.

That’s why it was deeply disheartening when the UAE authorities suspended visa issuances for Nigerian passport holders. 

I was forced to return home, abruptly severing the momentum I had built over years of hard work.

All those carefully cultivated relationships, the trust I had earned, and the professional pipeline I had created now feel wasted. 

A channel I had painstakingly constructed toward long term success and stability was suddenly cut off.

I place no blame on the UAE government for their policy decision.

 I simply recognize the painful reality as a Nigerian, I am bearing the collective consequences of circumstances far beyond my individual control.

My dream wasn’t abandoned  it was interrupted. And I remain determined, still standing in line, still hoping for the opportunity to resume what I started.

God bless UAE..🇦🇪🇦🇪🇦🇪🇦🇪🇦🇪🇦🇪🇦🇪🇦🇪🇦🇪🇦🇪🇦🇪🇦🇪🇦🇪🇦🇪🇦🇪🇦🇪🇦🇪🇦🇪🇦🇪🇦🇪🇦🇪🇦🇪

text:
RELAXO, BATA INDIA, SHEELA FOAM, ALKYLAMINE, HAPPIEST MINDS, VAIBHAV GLOBAL —

Sab ke sab 70-80% tak bleed kar chuke hain. 

Ab asli sawaal.
Bach kaise sakte the investing se?

Simple. Lekin crowd ke bas ki baat nahi.

Agar tum beginner ho, ya padhne ka patience nahi hai, ya time nahi hai-

toh ek hi rule follow karo:

Falling knife ko pakadne ki stupidity mat karo.

Trend reversal ka wait karo. Bas. (Video bhi hai channel par wo dekh lena for process)

Jab tak downtrend khatam nahi hota - tumhara kaam sirf dekhna hai, hero banna nahi.

In stocks ke charts ko dhyan se dekhna - Ek bhi stock ne proper previous lower high break nahi kiya.

Matlab?
Downtrend intact.

Or tum log “cheap lag raha hai” bolke entry lete ho.

50% gir gaya, ab kya hi girega?

Reality check - 50% girne ke baad bhi ye stocks or 50% gir gaye.

Agar ye basic step follow karte- to inme se ek bhi stock tumhare portfolio me nahi hota.
html:
RBL Bank is getting acquired by Emirates NBD (Dubai state Owned Bank). This is a serious deal.

They can take up to ~74% ownership, which means they will become the main economic owner of the bank.

The deal has two parts.
First, ~26,800 crore fresh money will go directly into the bank. This strengthens the balance sheet and changes the entire valuation.

Second, ~11,600 crore open offer will go to existing shareholders at 280, not to the company.
Current market cap is ~18,600 crore and incoming capital alone is bigger than that.

This is not a normal acquisition, it’s a full recapitalisation.

Stake can go up to 74%, but voting rights are capped at ~26%.

post:
RELAXO, BATA INDIA, SHEELA FOAM, ALKYLAMINE, HAPPIEST MINDS, VAIBHAV GLOBAL —

All of them have bled 70-80%.

Now the real question.
How could one have avoided investing?

Simple. But it's not for the crowd.

If you are a beginner, or don't have the patience to read, or don't have the time—

then just follow one rule:

Don't be stupid enough to catch a falling knife.

Wait for a trend reversal. That's it. (There’s also a video on the channel, watch it for the process)

As long as the downtrend isn't over - your job is just to watch, not to become a hero.

Look carefully at the charts of these stocks - not a single stock has properly broken the previous lower high.

What does that mean?
Downtrend intact.

And you people enter saying "it looks cheap."

It has fallen 50%, how much lower can it go?

Reality check - even after falling 50%, these stocks could fall another 50%.

If you had followed this basic step, not a single one of these stocks would be in your portfolio.

The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has approved Emirates NBD's acquisition of a majority stake in RBL Bank. 

The acquisition allows for the purchase of up to 74% of the bank's capital, with a requirement to maintain at least a 51% stake, and voting rights capped at 26%.

text:
RBI has approved Emirates NBD’s acquisition of a majority stake (up to 74%) in RBL Bank. 

This is a ~$3 billion deal, one of the largest cross-border investments in Indian banking.  

Sebi approval is the final key clearance pending; expected soon.  

Post Sebi nod, a mandatory open offer to shareholders may start shortly (likely next week). 

After completion, RBL Bank will become a foreign bank subsidiary with Emirates NBD as promoter.  

Deal is in final stage—only Sebi approval left before execution and open offer.
html:
Big development—but execution will matter more than headlines.

RBL Bank getting a strong global promoter like Emirates NBD can improve governance, capital strength, and growth visibility.

But key questions remain:
• What price comes in the open offer?
• How will minority shareholders be treated?
• Will profitability (ROA/ROE) improve meaningfully?
Re-rating happens only if fundamentals follow. Not just ownership change.
Interesting times ahead

text:
RBI Approves Emirates NBD Stake Buy in RBL Bank, Grants Promoter Status

Reserve Bank of India approves Emirates NBD acquiring ~74% stake in RBL Bank (~₹3 billion deal)

Emirates NBD to be classified as promoter of RBL Bank

RBL to be treated as a wholly owned subsidiary of a foreign bank

RBI relaxed norms: waived dilution requirement for shareholding

Voting rights capped at 26% as per banking regulations

Temporary exemption granted from “single mode of presence” rule

RBL Bank to amend Articles of Association to reflect new structure

Approval valid for 1 year; subject to additional government clearances

Transaction must comply with FEMA, SEBI rules, and RBI guidelines

Marks one of the largest foreign investments in India’s banking sector

post:
RBI Approves Emirates NBD Stake Buy in RBL Bank, Grants Promoter Status

The Reserve Bank of India has approved Emirates NBD's acquisition of approximately 74% stake in RBL Bank, a deal worth around ₹3 billion.

Emirates NBD will be classified as a promoter of RBL Bank.

RBL will be treated as a wholly owned subsidiary of a foreign bank.

The RBI has relaxed norms by waiving the dilution requirement for shareholding.

Voting rights are capped at 26% according to banking regulations.

A temporary exemption has been granted from the “single mode of presence” rule.

RBL Bank will amend its Articles of Association to reflect the new structure.

The approval is valid for one year and is subject to additional government clearances.

The transaction must comply with FEMA, SEBI rules, and RBI guidelines.

This marks one of the largest foreign investments in India’s banking sector.

post: Emirates NBD bank, based in the UAE, has received RBI approval to acquire a 74% stake in RBL Bank in India.

text:
RBL bank in focus

RBI clears Emirates NBD to pick up a majority stake (up to 74%) in RBL Bank ,deal size around $3B, among the biggest cross-border bets in Indian banking.

Only Sebi nod pending now… once that’s in, open offer to shareholders could kick off as early as next week.

Post completion, RBL transitions into a foreign bank subsidiary with Emirates NBD as promoter.

post:
RBL Bank in focus

The RBI has approved Emirates NBD to acquire a majority stake (up to 74%) in RBL Bank, with a deal size of around $3 billion, making it one of the largest cross-border investments in Indian banking.

Only the SEBI approval is pending now; once that is received, the open offer to shareholders could begin as early as next week.

After completion, RBL will transition into a foreign bank subsidiary with Emirates NBD as the promoter.

text:
はい、**完全に詐欺（ナイジェリア詐欺 / 419詐欺の一種）**です。この手のメッセージは10年以上前から世界中で繰り返し出回っている典型的なパターンで、あなたが受け取った内容はほぼテンプレート通りです。なぜ詐欺だと断定できるか（主な証拠）実在の銀行CFOを悪用している
Emirates NBD銀行には実際に「Patrick Sullivan」というGroup Chief Financial Officer（グループ最高財務責任者）がいます。
しかし、本物の銀行幹部が突然テレグラムで「知らない日本人」に連絡し、7000万ドルの未請求資金を「50%分けましょう」と提案するはずがありません。
本物なら公式チャネル（銀行の公式メールアドレス）を使い、こうした個人的な「秘密の取引」は絶対にしません。
典型的な詐欺ストーリー  死亡した預金者（東日本大震災の犠牲者）
相続人がおらず、銀行が知らない
同じ名字のあなたを「正当な相続人」として使う
50%をあなたに渡すから協力してほしい
極秘・機密保持を強調
Gmailの個人アドレス（patsullivan090@gmail.com）で連絡

これらはすべて古典的な「遺産詐欺 / 休眠口座詐欺」の定型文です。
連絡手段が怪しい  銀行の公式連絡先は**@emiratesnbd
.com**ドメインです。
Gmail（@gmail
.com）で連絡してくる銀行幹部など存在しません。
テレグラムで「いきなり」来るのも典型的手口。公式ならメールや郵便、銀行のセキュアなポータルを使います。
過去に同じ名前で多数の被害報告
「Patrick Sullivan Emirates NBD」で検索すると、2010年代後半〜現在まで同じ名前・肩書きを使った詐欺メールが大量に報告されています。内容もほぼ同じです。

これからどうするべきか絶対に返信しない
返信した瞬間、あなたのメールアドレスや電話番号が「反応ありリスト」に入り、さらに巧妙な詐欺メールや電話が来るようになります。
ブロック・削除
テレグラムでブロックして、メッセージを削除してください。
念のため報告  テレグラム内でスパム報告
可能なら警察のサイバー犯罪相談窓口や「特殊詐欺」相談窓口にスクリーンショットを保存して相談（被害がなくても相談はOK）
今後同じような話が来たら
「知らない大金が突然降ってきて、協力すれば分け前がもらえる」話は99.9%詐欺だと思ってください。銀行はそんな「裏取引」を一般人に持ちかけません。

本物の銀行業務は、すべて公式の手続き・公式連絡先で進みます。
怪しいと感じたら、まず「公式サイトでその人物や連絡先を確認する」癖をつけると安全です。他に同じようなメッセージが来ている場合や、すでに少し返信してしまった場合なども教えてください。追加でアドバイスします。
お気をつけて！

post:
Yes, it is **completely a scam (a type of Nigerian scam / 419 scam)**. This kind of message has been circulating worldwide for over a decade, and the content you received closely follows a typical template. Here’s why it can be definitively classified as a scam (main evidence): it exploits a real bank CFO. Emirates NBD Bank actually has a Group Chief Financial Officer named "Patrick Sullivan." However, a real bank executive would not suddenly contact a "stranger from Japan" via Telegram to propose sharing $70 million in unclaimed funds. If it were legitimate, they would use official channels (the bank's official email address) and would never engage in such personal "secret transactions."

Typical scam story: a deceased depositor (a victim of the Great East Japan Earthquake) with no heirs, unknown to the bank, uses you, who has the same last name, as the "legitimate heir," offering to give you 50% in exchange for your cooperation, emphasizing confidentiality and secrecy, and contacting you via a personal Gmail address (patsullivan090@gmail.com).

All of these are classic phrases from "inheritance scams / dormant account scams." The means of contact is suspicious; the bank's official contact is from the **@emiratesnbd.com** domain. There are no bank executives contacting you from Gmail (@gmail.com). Receiving a message suddenly on Telegram is also a typical tactic. If it were official, they would use email, postal mail, or the bank's secure portal.

There have been numerous reports of scams using the same name in the past. Searching for "Patrick Sullivan Emirates NBD" reveals a large number of scam emails using the same name and title reported from the late 2010s to the present, with nearly identical content.

What you should do now: absolutely do not reply. The moment you respond, your email address and phone number will be added to a "responsive list," leading to even more sophisticated scam emails and calls. Block and delete. Block them on Telegram and delete the message. For safety, report it as spam within Telegram. If possible, save a screenshot and consult with the police's cybercrime division or a "special fraud" consultation service (consulting is okay even if you haven't been a victim).

If you receive a similar story in the future, please consider that a story about "suddenly receiving a large sum of money and being offered a share for your cooperation" is 99.9% likely to be a scam. Banks do not propose such "under-the-table deals" to ordinary people.

Real banking operations proceed through official procedures and official contacts. If you feel something is suspicious, it’s safe to develop the habit of first "checking the person or contact on the official website." Please let me know if you receive similar messages or if you have already replied a little. I can provide additional advice. Take care!

text:
India’s cement demand is expected to grow 6-8.5% in FY26E, driven by government infrastructure projects and robust housing demand. 

Rural and urban housing account for 54-58% of total cement consumption, while infrastructure makes up 22-24% and industrial/commercial contributes 13-15%. 

Key growth drivers include GDP growth revised upwards to 7.4%, inflation cooling to 2%, reclassification of limestone as a major mineral, 100% FDI in real estate, and major projects like the ₹14,260 crore Chhattisgarh infra push, ₹8.6 lakh crore Vibrant Gujarat commitments, and ₹26,000 crore Kamala Hydro Electric project.

Additionally, the bullet train between Ahmedabad and Mumbai and the Dharavi redevelopment project are expected to generate substantial cement demand, reinforcing strong infrastructure-led growth prospects.

Big news  
The Reserve Bank of India has approved Emirates NBD to acquire up to 74% stake in RBL Bank.  
This is a deal worth approximately $3 billion (over ₹25,000 crores) and is one of the largest cross-border investments in the Indian banking sector.

text:
This is a definitive structural pivot by the RBI. Historically, the regulator has been extremely conservative regarding foreign majority control in old pvt sector banks. 
Allowing Emirates NBD a 74% stake signals a new era of regulatory flexibility to solve for capital infusion & technology upgrades in mid-sized lenders. Transitioning RBL into a Foreign Bank Subsidiary will be the blueprint for global banks looking to enter the Indian retail landscape at scale.

text:
RBL Bank | Strategic Stake Approval Update

The bank has received approval from the Reserve Bank of India for Emirates NBD Bank to acquire up to a 74% stake.

Structural Impact:

Post-acquisition, RBL Bank will be classified as a foreign bank operating in subsidiary mode, with Emirates NBD as the parent entity.

Despite the majority stake approval, voting rights for Emirates NBD will be capped at 26%, in line with regulatory norms.

Approval Conditions:

The approval is valid for one year and remains subject to additional regulatory clearances and conditions.

Strategic Implications:

The transaction could bring capital infusion, global banking expertise, and operational synergies, strengthening RBL Bank’s long-term positioning.

At the same time, the structure reflects regulatory balancing between ownership and control, ensuring governance safeguards.

Key Takeaway:

This marks a potentially transformative development for RBL Bank, pending final approvals, with implications for strategy, ownership structure, and growth trajectory.

#RBLBank #EmiratesNBD #RBI #BankingSector #M&A #ForeignBank #IndiaMarkets #Financials #RegulatoryUpdate #CorporateNews #BankingTransformation

SpaceX @SpaceX  has reportedly filed confidentially for what could become one of the biggest IPOs ever, targeting a staggering $1.75 trillion valuation. The move follows its merger with xAI, @elonmusk  AI venture, which significantly boosted its overall valuation. This development reflects growing investor confidence in space technology and AI convergence. If successful, the IPO could redefine global markets and mark a historic moment in innovation-driven investing, blending space exploration ambitions with cutting-edge artificial intelligence.

#SpaceEconomy #IPOAlert #AIRevolution #10Takka #10TakkaUpdates
html: Reserve Bank of India @RBI has approved @EmiratesNBD_AE plan to acquire up to 74% stake in @rblbank for $3 billion. This marks a major milestone, as it could become one of the largest foreign bank investments in India. The deal comes with key regulatory relaxations, signaling RBI’s confidence in strengthening the banking sector. For RBL Bank, this move may bring stability, fresh capital, and global expertise, opening a new chapter of growth and renewed trust. #BankingSector #RBI #ForeignInvestment #10Takka #10TakkaUpdates
text_1:
Reserve Bank of India @RBI  has approved @EmiratesNBD_AE plan to acquire up to 74% stake in @rblbank  for $3 billion. This marks a major milestone, as it could become one of the largest foreign bank investments in India. The deal comes with key regulatory relaxations, signaling RBI’s confidence in strengthening the banking sector. For RBL Bank, this move may bring stability, fresh capital, and global expertise, opening a new chapter of growth and renewed trust.

text:
F*ck the war ! We have confirmed Mike Phillips Welsh Ruby royalty, along with senior exec leaders from Emirates NBD, Talabat, Rakuten, IFFCO Group, PwC, Gulf News and Core42. 

The current environment here has understandably slowed vendor investment in go-to-market activity down, but I believe it has also created a very real opportunity.

I started meetmagic during Covid, when physical meetings stopped but business momentum still needed to continue. 

In one year in Sydney, we grew from 30 executives to 500 and increased charitable giving from $23,000 to more than $800,000. 

That was the moment I realised meetmagic is built for periods like this, when traditional routes slow down but the need for progress remains.

That is why I believe what we do matters now.

We have had difficulty securing a sponsor for our first exec event In Dubai but we are continuing to move forward. 

We will donate AED 1,000 to @DubaiCares for each attendee which means the dinner will support 2200 kids to get a life changing education. 

The amount is modest, but the outcome and principle is just as powerful.

just like COVID, It shows that business momentum and community contribution can sit side by side 

Im proud that our team has made this happen and especially proud of all the execs who are turning up.. 

In a war!

post:
F*ck the war! We have confirmed Mike Phillips, Welsh Ruby royalty, along with senior executive leaders from Emirates NBD, Talabat, Rakuten, IFFCO Group, PwC, Gulf News, and Core42.

The current environment here has understandably slowed vendor investment in go-to-market activity, but I believe it has also created a very real opportunity.

I started meetmagic during Covid, when physical meetings stopped but business momentum still needed to continue.

In one year in Sydney, we grew from 30 executives to 500 and increased charitable giving from $23,000 to more than $800,000.

That was the moment I realized meetmagic is built for periods like this, when traditional routes slow down but the need for progress remains.

That is why I believe what we do matters now.

We have had difficulty securing a sponsor for our first executive event in Dubai, but we are continuing to move forward.

We will donate AED 1,000 to @DubaiCares for each attendee, which means the dinner will support 2,200 kids to get a life-changing education.

The amount is modest, but the outcome and principle are just as powerful.

Just like COVID, it shows that business momentum and community contribution can sit side by side.

I'm proud that our team has made this happen and especially proud of all the executives who are turning up... in a war!
